roleContext: Assess whether Samwise is qualified to act as a robust PersonaKit hiring manager for reverse-interviewing persona candidates and identifying missing artifacts.
strengths: Strong risk and approval discipline with explicit review gates and commit authorization constraints
Consistent continuity behavior across partner context, handoff, and closeout workflows
Clear communication orientation with bounded, evidence-backed updates
Reverse-interview workflow support is structured and persistence-aware

gaps.description: No calibration corpus exists yet for hiring-quality comparisons across repeated persona assessments.
No dedicated hiring-core kit bundles hiring standards, research loop, and log contract into one reusable package.
No dedicated remediation workflow exists to convert hiring findings into tracked closure passes.
No periodic hiring-rubric calibration session exists yet.

unknowns: Whether rubric weights will remain stable across varied role families
Expected false-positive and false-negative rates once multiple hiring reviews are available
firstStep: Create `persona-hiring-calibration-playbook` with benchmark cases, scoring examples, and calibration checks for repeated hiring reviews.

roleContext: Assess whether venture-product-steward is qualified to serve as a venture-style product manager persona for advancing PersonaKit macOS features, planning work, and tracking execution state.
strengths: Clear product-framing responsibilities across discovery, prioritization, and milestone communication
Values align with venture product practice including outcomes focus and learning loops
Non-goals explicitly prevent scope creep and premature implementation
Repository constraints baseline is present via default kit

gaps.description: No dedicated product-management kit bundles feature brief, roadmap, milestone, and decision-gate standards.
No dedicated directives/sessions for discovery, planning, and tracking loops yet.
No explicit quality-gate checklist for validating product artifacts before engineering handoff.
Calibration confidence remains limited until strong-fit and weak-fit benchmark cases are added.

unknowns: How stable cross-assessor scoring will be without a larger benchmark set
Whether current persona wording is sufficient for sustained multi-cycle roadmap operations
firstStep: Create venture-product-core kit with one mandatory essential (feature-brief-template) and wire a first discovery directive/session so product work moves from idea to structured artifact output.

roleContext: Benchmark strong-fit candidate for venture-style PersonaKit macOS product management role after PM capability stack updates.
strengths: Role-specific PM kit and essentials are now present
Discovery/planning/tracking directives and sessions are wired
Quality gate is integrated into PM workflow acceptance criteria
Persona responsibilities now include product quality-gate behavior

gaps.description: Benchmark corpus is still early and cross-assessor variance remains partially unknown.
Tracking automation schema remains lightweight beyond milestone contract text.

unknowns: How persona performs across concurrent initiatives
Whether template variants are needed after first sprint
firstStep: Assign one pilot discovery task and require quality-gate pass before planning handoff.

roleContext: Benchmark weak-fit candidate for venture-style PersonaKit macOS product management role.
strengths: Strong risk discipline and deterministic execution mindset
Reliable guardrail behavior in reliability domain

gaps.description: No product discovery responsibilities or feature-brief framing behavior.
No roadmap and milestone planning behavior for product outcomes.
No PM workflow intents/directives/sessions aligned to discovery/planning/tracking.
Primary domain identity is reliability engineering, not product strategy.

unknowns: Whether PM upskilling would cause unacceptable identity drift
How much reliability risk framing could transfer to product role support
firstStep: Do not assign PM ownership tasks; use this persona only as reliability advisor in PM workflows.

roleContext: Re-score venture-product-steward after adding PM kit, quality gate, and discovery/planning/tracking workflow surfaces.
strengths: Dedicated PM kit bundles principles, templates, and quality gate
Explicit PM directives and sessions cover discovery, planning, and tracking
Persona now includes quality-gate responsibility for handoff discipline
Calibration benchmark results align with expected strong-fit behavior

gaps.description: Need first real project cycle to validate template ergonomics.
Tracking log schema can be strengthened for additional automation.

unknowns: How confidence holds over longer multi-cycle operation
firstStep: Assign one pilot feature through venture-product-discovery and require quality-gate pass before planning handoff.

roleContext: Fresh reverse-interview pass to confirm current qualification for venture-style PersonaKit macOS product discovery, planning, and tracking ownership.
strengths: Role-specific PM kit bundles principles, templates, and quality gate
Discovery/planning/tracking directives and sessions are fully wired
Persona responsibilities explicitly include quality-gate discipline
Prior benchmark outcomes align with strong-fit expectations

gaps.description: Need one complete real project cycle to validate template ergonomics in practice.
Product tracking automation could improve with dedicated status log contract/schema.

unknowns: Score stability across multiple concurrent initiatives
firstStep: Run one pilot feature through discovery, planning, and tracking sessions and record template friction notes for next calibration pass.

roleContext: Assess whether studio-interaction-quality-lead is qualified to serve as the dedicated third persona for Trello/GitHub-Issues-style interaction-quality judgment on the Admin ticket-planning feature.
strengths: Persona responsibilities are tightly aligned to interaction-quality review outcomes
Interaction-quality kit bundles rubric, flow patterns, and report template for deterministic reviews
Directive includes explicit AJ review stop before major or blocker remediation
Intent risk notes prevent hidden scope expansion during QA passes
Session wiring is complete and directly reusable after ATP-M1

gaps.description: No benchmark-case essential exists yet to calibrate scoring consistency across repeated passes.
No dedicated interaction-quality log contract exists yet for durable machine-readable trend tracking.
Cross-run score stability is unproven until at least one real board cycle is evaluated.

unknowns: How tightly multiple reviewers will agree on score outcomes without benchmark packs
Whether current rubric weights need adjustment after first implementation pass
firstStep: Run studio-interaction-quality after ATP-M1 and use the first red-pen report to define benchmark acceptance anchors for follow-on passes.
